text:
/ci3 2 t3 無駄に時間食っちゃった。
こっちは違うみたいね。
戻って、もう片方の道に進もう！

/ci3 2 t3 That was a waste of time. Looks like
this isn't the way. Let's double back and take
the other path!

無駄に時間食っちゃった。
こっちは違うみたいね。
戻って、もう片方の道に進もう！

That was a waste of time. Looks like this isn't
the way. Let's double back and take the other
path!
